title: Let's Play Mork Borg! With Mork Manual
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IHsdTOEuG4g

Daniel (@dungeondive) runs a casual solo adventure combining Mork Manual (the fantasy-themed Mork Borg variant) with The Gardens of Yen, an OSR point-crawl supplement. He creates character Tanner Lee and companion Jambo, exploring a narrative where they must recover a stolen bag of holding from a thief. The video demonstrates practical solo gameplay mechanics, random table integration, and how to adapt existing OSR supplements for Mork Borg while maintaining creative exploration and improvisation.

----

What's your preferred approach to combining supplements from different systems into your Mork Borg games, and have you had unexpected moments of brilliance from the clash?
